mapper.insert: INSERT INTO gen_file_ocr ( ocr_mission_id, file_id, status_type, processed_doc_id, error_message, create_time, start_time, end_time ) VALUES ( #{ocrMission.ocrMissionId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{ocrMission.sourceDocumentId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{ocrMission.statusType,jdbcType=INTEGER,typeHandler=top.emilejones.hhu.pipeline.handler.MissionStatusHandler}, #{ocrMission.processedDocumentId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{ocrMission.errorMessage,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{ocrMission.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{ocrMission.startTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{ocrMission.endTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE file_id = #{ocrMission.sourceDocumentId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, status_type = #{ocrMission.statusType,jdbcType=INTEGER,typeHandler=top.emilejones.hhu.pipeline.handler.MissionStatusHandler}, processed_doc_id = #{ocrMission.processedDocumentId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, error_message = #{ocrMission.errorMessage,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, start_time = #{ocrMission.startTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, end_time = #{ocrMission.endTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}

INSERT INTO gen_file_ocr ( ocr_mission_id, file_id, status_type, processed_doc_id, error_message, create_time, start_time, end_time ) VALUES
( #{item.ocrMissionId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.sourceDocumentId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.statusType,jdbcType=INTEGER,typeHandler=top.emilejones.hhu.pipeline.handler.MissionStatusHandler}, #{item.processedDocumentId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.errorMessage,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.startTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.endTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} )
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE file_id = VALUES(file_id), status_type = VALUES(status_type), processed_doc_id = VALUES(processed_doc_id), error_message = VALUES(error_message), start_time = VALUES(start_time), end_time = VALUES(end_time)
mapper.select: SELECT file_id FROM gen_file_ocr WHERE status_type IN (0, 1, 2, 3, 4) ORDER BY create_time DESC, CASE status_type WHEN 0 THEN 1 -- CREATED WHEN 1 THEN 2 -- PENDING WHEN 2 THEN 3 -- RUNNING WHEN 3 THEN 4 -- ERROR WHEN 4 THEN 5 -- SUCCESS END ASC, file_id DESC LIMIT #{limit,jdbcType=INTEGER} OFFSET #{offset,jdbcType=INTEGER}

SELECT ocr_mission_id, file_id, status_type, processed_doc_id, error_message, create_time, start_time, end_time FROM gen_file_ocr WHERE file_id = #{sourceDocumentId,jdbcType=VARCHAR} ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT ocr_mission_id, file_id, status_type, processed_doc_id, error_message, create_time, start_time, end_time FROM gen_file_ocr WHERE ocr_mission_id = #{ocrMissionId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
